name: Pig Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Mandarin orange juice and chopped oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Crushed pineapple and juice (1#)
2. Instant Vanilla pudding
3. Cool whip (8-oz)
- Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
- Cooking time: 30 minutes.
- Chopped up the Mandarin oranges.
- Mix all ingredients together and beat for 5 minutes.
- Pour into a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan.
- Bake for 30 minutes. Let cool.
4. Drain pineapple and retain the juice.
5. Pour pineapple juice with the dry pudding mix and beat until thick.
6. Fold in Cool Whip.
7. Fold in the crushed pineapple.
8. Frost cake and refrigerate.
